title: ononis repens subsp. intermedia
intro: Ononis repens subsp. intermedia, also known as Spurred Restharrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Spurred Restharrow include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a useful remedy for conditions such as eczema and acne. Spurred Restharrow is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or cream, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
